|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| ^xE05030 ^x70FF70 Tips ^7|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|^7^7
^x70FF701.^7^xE05030 ^7^xAF6025^7You will need to start with Rolling Magma + Flame Wall + Holy Flame totem. Absolution can be swapped it after lvl 12 or a little later if you prefer early with Rolling.
^x70FF702.^7^7 Eldritch Battery is pretty important.
^x70FF703.^7 Double curse is a pretty great DPS boost - use ^x7070FFElemental weakness^7 first and ^x7070FFConductivity^7 after. Swap it to Mark and Punishment when you will get Doryanis.
^xAF6025 ^x70FF704.^7 Any Kind of Defensive Spectres will do, they are mostly there for feeding frenzy. Animated Guardian is great as well. ^7^7 ^x70FF705.^7 ^x8888FF^7^xE05030^7Use shield charge to have *Have you attacked recently* checked^7 - Combine it with ^x70FF70Haste^7 to move faster.
^x70FF706.^7 Convocation helps to move all minions to you to make clear faster. ^x70FF70 ^x70FF70^7 |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|^7^7 ^x70FF70Thank you for checking the build out!^x70FF70 ^7^x70FF70Wish you a great league start^7^7!^7 ^x70FF70Please like the video and subscribe to the channel if you enjoyed it.^7 |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| ^x70FF70
